data.body: DONE (commit a3a7eb2d). Ported both field-read arms to rebar._engine_support.field_reads (pure helpers + byte-parity CLI), routed in-process via _FIELD_READS (full auto-init), rewired library off _run. Dual-run parity 12 scenarios green (success/miss/arity/empty, both --output modes; file-impact spaced+silent-[]-on-miss, verify-commands compact+envelope-on-miss). interfaces+unit 1281 passed. Live binary verified. No bash deleted (parity-pinned 2nd impl until E7/E8).
